name: roomler-ai-e2e
comment: Empty package marker — overrides ui/package.json's `type: module` so Playwright's TS transform treats .spec.ts files as CJS. Bun's Node compat layer can't handle Playwright's ESM preflight loader (looks for a synthetic `<file>.esm.preflight` module), so we keep the e2e tree CJS-classified. Same trick used in gjovanov/lgr/packages/e2e.
